context: Checks whether the final artifact follows the release-engine instructions from the published Rails Agent Skills tile.

checklist.name: instruction-1
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Use this skill when the task is to ship a Rails engine as a gem or prepare a new version.

checklist.name: instruction-2
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Run full test suite: `bundle exec rspec`. Fix all failures before proceeding.

checklist.name: instruction-3
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Verify gemspec metadata and dependencies match tested Rails/Ruby versions.

checklist.name: instruction-4
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Dry-run the gem build: `gem build *.gemspec && gem push --dry-run *.gem`. Verify contents.

checklist.name: instruction-5
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Load these files only when their specific content is needed:

checklist.name: instruction-6
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **[assets/release_checklist.md](assets/release_checklist.md)** — Use when you need a detailed step-by-step verification checklist before finalizing the release

checklist.name: instruction-7
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **[assets/release_notes_template.md](assets/release_notes_template.md)** — Use when drafting GitHub release notes or long-form release announcements
